description: OpenAPI spec generation from .NET API via NSwag/Swashbuckle
steps: Configure OpenAPI/Swagger in Program.cs with API versioning (/api/v1/)
All existing controllers are documented in the generated spec
Swagger UI accessible at /swagger in development

description: TypeScript client and React Query hooks auto-generation from OpenAPI
steps: Add NSwag or openapi-typescript-codegen to packages/api-client
Create npm script 'generate' that generates TypeScript types and client from OpenAPI spec
React Query hooks (useQuery for GET, useMutation for POST/PATCH/DELETE) are generated or manually wrapped
All 3 web apps can import from @fexora/api-client
